title: Filipino-Style Stir-Fried Pancit with Cucumber
description: A twist on the classic Chinese stir-fry, featuring Filipino-style noodles and fresh cucumber.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the sliced cucumber and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until it starts to soften.
Add the pancit noodles and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until they're well coated with the sauce.
Add the Filipino-style sauce and stir-fry for another minute until the noodles are well coated.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
